headline: 2 Reasons to Avoid STT and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: In a sliding market, State Street has defied the odds, trading up to $126.57 per share. Its 11.6% gain since October 2025 has outpaced the S&P 500’s 5.5% drop. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
